title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: MAIN OFFICE OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Hours may range from 5-20 hours a month. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 800 N Bayshore Drive Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the Federal Poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 269-2013 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 269-2013 Melissa Dovenspike [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Some services may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Adult Day Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Adult Day Programs * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Disability Related Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Home Delivered Meals * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Home Delivered Meals * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients In Home Meal Preparation * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Personal Care * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Personal Care * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - ASSISTED TRANSPORTATION TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION PASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
